failures.query: BBB CoreCap tubeless valve site:wiggle.com OR site:chainreactioncycles.com

Schwalbe Clik valve price EUR buy
LME aluminum price USD per ton today

10.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Tubeless Valve - Set of 2 - 40 mm | BIKE24
10.evidenceText: Product descriptions provided for both 40mm and 80mm Schwalbe Clik Valve sets, but no price information is included in the evidence text
10.extractionRationale: No retail prices were mentioned in either of the two provided sources. The evidence only includes product descriptions and features, with pricing data absent from the content

27.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve product listings on BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Three distinct Clik Valve 2er Set product pages identified: (1) p1859949.html - 60mm, (2) p1859948.html - 40mm, (3) p1859950.html - 80mm. Source 4 is a category page. Source 5 is an inner tube accessory with Clik Valve.
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs for Clik Valve products. Three distinct product listings found at p1859949.html, p1859948.html, and p1859950.html, each with different valve lengths (60mm, 40mm, 80mm respectively). Excluded the category/filter page (Source 4) and the inner tube accessory (Source 5) as they are not primary Clik Valve product listings.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - blue | 2 Pieces - BIKE24
30.evidenceText: The product listing contains a product description and features section. No stock status indicators (out of stock, unavailable, nicht verfügbar, ausverkauft, etc.) are present in the provided content.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the available text. While the content includes product description and features, no explicit stock availability information is provided in the excerpt.

56.evidenceText: Schwalbe Schlauch Nr. 15, Nr. 12, Nr. 7, Nr. 13 (from Source 1); No. 17 (from Source 3); No. 19 (from Source 4) - all with Clik Valve (SCV) designation
56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik Valve interface across the four sources. Excluded conversion kits (SV-SCV, DV-SCV) and pump head adapters. Identified 7 unique tube models: Nr. 3, 7, 12, 13, 15, 17, and 19.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum is expected to trade at 3372.15 USD/Tonne by the end of this quarter
61.extractionRationale: Extracted the aluminum price value of 3372.15 USD/Tonne directly from the Trading Economics source. The price is already in USD per metric ton as required, so no conversion was necessary.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: The source provides the price as 1,793.99, which represents cents per pound (standard format for aluminum premiums). Converted to USD/lb: 1,793.99 ÷ 100 = 17.94 USD/lb, rounded to two decimal places.
